# Day 16 media fixtures

The PNG, JPG, WAV, and MP3 fixtures are generated by
`scripts/generate-day16-fixtures.cjs` with the pinned
`@ffmpeg-installer/win32-x64@4.1.0` binary already used by the project.

They are short synthetic color/sine files created only for content-signature,
copy, hash, duplicate, conflict, Unicode-path, and rollback tests. The fake PNG
and unsupported text fixtures are intentionally invalid.
